title: Imposition of monetary penalty: Markom Management Limited
body: "Details of monetary penalty decision against Markom Management Limited (“MML”) for the contravention of The Ukraine (European Union Financial Sanctions) (No.2) Regulations 2014 (“the Ukraine Regulations”) which gave effect to Council Regulation (EU) No 269/2014 (Ukraine Misappropriation and Human Rights) (“the EU Regulations”). "
